title: microsorum multijugatum
intro: Microsorum multijugatum, also known as Chinese water clover or water clover, is a type of aquatic fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Microsorum multijugatum include its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which can help to boost the immune system and protect against infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
